productDisplayName: Ant Kids Crystal Button Black Tops
description: CompositionBlack sleeveless top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, chest placket with crystal buttons, drop waist with a belt and crystal embellishments and piping along the neck, chest placket and drop waistFittingComfortWash careWash separately with mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Dry clean preferred Designed for your pretty little princess, this black top from ant oozes girly attitude. The crystal embellishments enhance its stylish look, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Team this top with slim Fit jeans or knee-length skirts for unparalleled cool.
